title: Via, Et Veritas, Et Vita
content:
"You never attained to Him?" "If to attain
        Be to abide, then that may be."
    "Endless the way, followed with how much pain!"
         "The way was He."
meaning:
This evocative piece by Alice Christiana Gertrude Thompson Meynell, titled "Via, Et Veritas, Et Vita", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
